summary: Backend-focused verification completed for branch conflict_190626_0326 against https://wc2026-nine-sepia.vercel.app. Feature code is present in branch, route wiring/build artifacts include Compare and Trophy3D, and no code-loss evidence was found. Live deployment shows partial API mismatch: /api/stats and /api/results work, but /api/health returns 404.

critical.issue: Returns 404 NOT_FOUND on public preview URL while other /api endpoints are active.

action_items: Re-deploy preview and verify /api/health is included in that deployment artifact.
Confirm Vercel project/root mapping is consistent (root /api wrappers + frontend build) for this exact preview URL.
After redeploy, rerun backend endpoint suite and validate /api/health returns 200/503 JSON instead of 404.
critical_code_review_comments: Feature files requested by E1 are present in branch: Compare page, ThemePicker, FavoriteButton, Trophy3D, MatchDayToday, MyTeams, Admin page.
App route wiring includes /compare and ThemePicker usage in header.
Production build locally emits Compare and Trophy3D chunks, indicating feature code is compiled and not deleted.
Observed issue is deployment mismatch/partial route availability rather than feature code loss in this branch.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified requested feature source files and route wiring are present in codebase. Local yarn build includes Compare and Trophy3D output chunks. Public preview endpoint behavior is inconsistent: /api/stats and /api/results pass, /api/health 404.
rca of the issue: Reproduction: pytest against REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://wc2026-nine-sepia.vercel.app -> 4/5 tests pass; only GET /api/health fails with 404. Direct curl confirms /api/stats?action=usage=200 and /api/results=200 on same host, but /api/health=404 NOT_FOUND. Root cause is deployment-level route/artifact mismatch (partial API exposure) rather than code deletion. Mitigation: redeploy current commit/branch and verify serverless route registration for /api/health in the same Vercel project receiving traffic. MOCKED APIs: NONE.
